content.text: Explain the relationship between the event at 00:00:02 and the situation at 00:00:05.

reasoning_content.text: The causal chain begins with the white sedan's decision to turn left without adequate clearance. The red sedan, traveling straight with right-of-way, cannot stop in time. The momentum transfer from the collision pushes the white sedan sideways into the pedestrian crossing area.

content.text: At 00:00:02, the white sedan begins a left-hand turn across oncoming traffic without yielding. By 00:00:05, this failure to yield has resulted in a T-bone collision with the red sedan, leaving both vehicles immobilized in the intersection — the white sedan pushed across the crosswalk and the red sedan stopped in the middle of the junction.
